default_cv_termination_rule.summary: Terminate CV when any one of the approved current or time thresholds is reached.

hard_stop_rules: Stop immediately if measured cell-surface temperature reaches 60 C.
Stop immediately if cell voltage exceeds the approved upper voltage limit defined by the datasheet or approved test plan.
Stop immediately if cell voltage falls below the approved lower voltage limit defined by the datasheet or approved test plan.

thermocouple_placement.minimum_requirement: At least one thermocouple must be attached to the cell surface for energized tests where thermal excursion matters.

default_by_form_factor.pouch: Place the thermocouple at the centre of the largest surface.
default_by_form_factor.cylindrical: Place the thermocouple at mid-height on the outer can.
default_by_form_factor.large_format: Place the thermocouple at the hottest expected region, or use centre plus tab-near region when two channels are available.
default_by_form_factor.general: Attach the thermocouple to the cell surface at a location representative of the hottest expected region.

performance.label: Performance characterization
performance.description: Minimum recommended package for a performance-focused pretest campaign.

rpt.label: Reference performance test
rpt.description: Minimum recommended package for an RPT check-up bundle.

soh_modeling.label: SOH modeling
soh_modeling.description: Minimum recommended package for model-training or model-validation data collection.

cycle_life.label: Cycle life
cycle_life.description: Minimum recommended package for a cycle-life campaign.

calendar_ageing.label: Calendar ageing
calendar_ageing.description: Minimum recommended package for a calendar-ageing campaign.
minimum_modules: storage at defined SOC and temperature

hppc.label: HPPC screening
hppc.description: Minimum recommended package for a pulse power characterisation.
minimum_modules: SOC staircase with paired discharge and charge pulses
wait for pseudo-OCV before each pulse block
optional_modules: reduced SOC grid for faster screening

rate_capability.label: Rate capability
rate_capability.description: Minimum recommended package for a rate-capability ladder.

soc_ocv.label: SOC-OCV / slow curve
soc_ocv.description: Minimum recommended package for a slow-curve OCV/EMF measurement.
minimum_modules: slow discharge at C/25 with fine logging (1 min / 1 mV / 0.2 K)
optional_modules: OCV/EMF averaging from charge and discharge curves

eis.label: EIS
eis.description: Minimum recommended package for a SOC-resolved electrochemical impedance spectroscopy test.
minimum_modules: potentiostatic EIS at 5 mV rms, 10 kHz to 10 mHz

preconditioning.label: Preconditioning
preconditioning.description: Minimum recommended package for cell stabilisation before formal testing.
minimum_modules: 3 charge-discharge cycles at standard cycle rate
capacity stability gate: difference < 2% between successive discharges
optional_modules: extension to 10 cycles maximum if gate not met

baseline_rpt: optional SOC-OCV or EIS if required by project
intermediate_rpt: optional EIS if degradation mechanism tracking is needed
end_of_life_rpt: optional EIS / SOC-OCV / ICA if final diagnosis is required
